steps.text: Okay, thanks!
Do you accept the challenge?
Could you help me find it? If I can find it, I will repay you handsomely.
Sorry, I used all the Magic Potions on my sheep. Please come early next year.
I have prepared all materials for potion. Here they are.
Thank you very much. I can go back to the village and show off my hair.
I want to ask you, why...am I so handsome?!
Thank you for your help to win a heart of my beloved. Please take this gift and have a good journey.
Disgusting! I can defeat these lions after full preparation.
Really? Thank you so much! You can find #RBlack Medicine/#R in #Rbick's/#R house near the shop easily!
Hubert asked me to buy it for him. Can you sell it to me?
It couldn't hurt... I'll go see the doctor. Take this for your troubles!
(Maybe I can find out something about the #RBlack Medicine/#R from these bottles! )
This ring must've been left by Claude... I'll give it to Lia.
Sure, where is your house?
It's not too difficult, I can finish it quickly!
Yes... you found it, but it's too late to finish! I have to turn it in tomorrow!
Please stop bothering me.
I know my child is naughty, but he always gives me special things.
Hey boy, what's your name? I'll find your mother.
Really? Thanks!
Thank you so much, Jam enjoyed his birthday!
What are you looking for? Need help?
Please, take this.
Did you go back to find your mom?
Wooo... who can help me find my mom?
Xao Li and Xao Yung still haven't returned.
Jam, where is your beetle?
I still need #R5x Black Jade, 3x Copper Ore and 2x Northern Tiger Skin/#R. I want to make the most powerful sword in the world!
I'll go back when I finish this sword, tell brother not to worry about me.
Thanks for your help!
Who are you, are you here to kill me?
We'd better leave as soon as we can, or they'll find us!
I want to defeat General Charlie and rescue Leo.
If I don't give it back, what will you do?
I want to leave for a while, stay here and wait for me, okay?
Thanks for helping me, I have a good job!
(I think I'd better go to visit #RWheel Ben/#R, I should see if Cool King got the job.)
A huge monster, seriously?
Xiaomo, Xiaomo, where are you? Why don't you come and find me?
Wait, Mao is a good monster! He's not here to hurt you!
Can you get the gem that's socketed on my head? It cures many diseases, I found it in the forest...
I can help you give this gem to her.
In what part of #RWish Forest/#R did you see the monster?
Little sister, I got you some small daisies... Please don't be upset at me!
I have an idea! Let's give them to Xao Fen next to Longai Hotel! She loves them!
Have you finished delivering #R5x BBQ Pork Buns/#R?
Angela, Misia took us under his wing. The road to defeating King Howert is still long, but we'll do anything to reach the end!
Excuse me. I need to leave.
It's in my dough-case. Please keep this a secret.
Thanks so much for Roast Pork...
Should we give the Cebu Stone a try?
There is a cave in front, maybe #RMagellan/#R and #Rhis crew/#R will be there.
Kanako, I want to save Miyuki and Yuta with you.
#Rkanako/#R will leave the team, please unequip anything she is wearing to prevent losing it.
Everyone will listen to the boss.
You don't need to know so much because you'll be dead soon.
The boss is really brutal, I want to beat him down and rescue Miyuki.
Woo? Where is Kanako?
Yes, I did! I need to eat something other than a dumpling however... If you bring me other food, I'll reward you!
Thanks... Wow, it's delicious! ! !
Give Qu Yuan the #Rpizza/#R.

#B Poached Eggs /#B are my grandchild?s favorite, but the problem is that our chickens run all over so we never know where they have layed their eggs! How can I cook for my grandchild if I can't find the eggs?
Yes! But, I have decided to give to the neighborhood kitty, if I give it to you, then what can I leave for the cat?
There's a ore market near BAltarR/#B, you can go to find BSilvery OreR/#B. Can you be quick?
I have nothing to express my thanks to you. However, a patient gave me a mortgage because he has no money. I can find no use for it, so I will give it to you as a present.
Ah! How can you know that I have them? Even my father doesn?t know that I have hidden other kinds of Grape Seeds. Ok, I will give you some, but please don't tell my father.
You're a great help to me, thank you.
Ok, thank you!
Hey! How strange it is! This area was once the place we merchants collected BHoneyR/#B.
Just now I have observed that the Cave Bear only wanted to find food. Maybe you should think other methods! What's more, it didn't hurt the villagers.
Hey! I can't find my animal friend. I don't know where is it.
Splendid, the BNutR/#B is its favorite, you can take it with you and give it to it if you find it.
Thank you indeed.
You can collect honey here from now on, because the cave bears were driven away.
Thanks, a villager named Emilie, who is nearby the cave entrance, has some Hill Pepper.
Thanks.
Thanks, as you see I don't have the fence, so I have to stay here.
Ahh... thank you so much , my hero.
Treasure chests, barrels, and other items may appear anywhere. You can click on them to take the items inside. For example, the wooden box next to me can be broken to get the items inside.
Ah! You come here at the right time. I took a nap just now. But when I woke up, I found my sword had gone. I have no time to buy another one. Can you help me buy a #Riron sword/#R from Weaponry?
Ha-ha! I finally find a treasure worthy of collecting.
The supper today is very fresh. I will give you some!
Thank you for not killing me, bye! I'm going to find another corner to hide myself.
Youth, you helped me a lot today. These are rewards for you. Take them!
You forgot to find me the BLarge Assembly ToolR/#B.
There is an injured rabbit. It will die if the bleeding is not stopped.
We shot a rabbit when hunting, but it disappeared when we arrived. Strange!
Oh! How can I find her in such a large place?
Where is the B1x Magnet StoneR/#B you promised to find for me?
Okay, then I will go to the BFlaming Place of MountainR/#B and flame to seek Bthe Egg of the Fire PhoenixR/#B.
BThe Egg of the Fire PhoenixR/#B I want is in BFlaming Place of MountainR/#B.
Thank you for helping me!
Good! There is nothing to do; you all can go back except for the hero.
Your Majesty, you were being controlled by this snake, luckily I killed it or the consequences would be too ghastly to contemplate.
I will return to my hometown.
How much firewood do you need?
Thank you for your help! It could have been terrible if the information had taken by the enemy!
Thanks for your help, the information wasn't taken by the enemy.
Should I give the fruit on me to him?
How much rice do you need to solve your problem?
Thank you for helping me out! This reward is for you!
Thank you! Thanks to your rice, I got through the hardship!
Rabbit, this is the Coconut Basin you needed, and you can go on grinding medicine!
The leader in Chang'an Arena was seeking an opponent who can defeat him but failed. Since you will go to that the arena, would you like to have a fair fight with our leader?
No. Thanks.
(Will you try to help them kill Year Beast?)

Oh! Isn't it the Ocean Heart? I never expected to see it with my own two eyes. Let me tell you a legend about it. It's said one can find treasure if you put the Ocean Heart in a Cursed Arena. Take this diamond, I wish you can get the secret treasure.
I finally kill Year Beast!
Thank you! I would have lost my house but for your help.
Please take your prize from #RAward Giver/#R beside me!
Player must win #R23 battles/#R before challenging King in the instance. You will finish instance if you defeat King #Rwithin 30 minutes/#R.
You need to win at least 1 battle to be able to claim the reward.
Of course, #n/#n, but before that you should collect #Rred, white and green/#R wool for me, and then I can make a sock for you to keep the gift in!
#Rwish treasure fills your home in New Year/#R
Hah, thanks for the much, but now you're going to be my next plant-food! ! !
Please defeat down within 40 minutes, otherwise it will be too late ...
I find the partners you want.
It is very painful, I have been wounded by the ghosts of this island, and I need some food to recover. Can you find B3 steamed stuffed bunsR/#B?
Thank you very much for helping me, now I can go to my hometown and seek my parents.
Please do not leak the secret.
Alas! It's my loving dog Laifu. He climbed so high that I really don't know how to get him down. Can you do me a favor and figure out a way to get him down?
Who can help me get my loving dog Laifu down?
This is the special Prepared Chinese Ink you wanted. Bring more with your later on.

The board reads: The king has been ill for a long time. The royal doctor needed the blood of Crane as an inducement for the medicine. If anybody finds the Crane, please inform the Kings Sodiers. You will be awarded a lot.
You can leave now. This is your reward.
There is not enough firewood on our island, I have been searching all day with no luck. How will I cook tonight?
(Do not look for trouble)
Please, forgive me, masters! You see, business is down lately, can you give me several more days?
Ah! Great! Somebody like me has been unexpectedly swallowed by the Water Monster.
Ah! I finally have my own kid. I'm so happy! Thanks for your help.
Hum, you come at the right time, today I will kill you!
I must bring #RKanako/#R back home so they don't worry about her safety.
Ha! Are you kidding me? Okay, since you don't have enough money, why don't you give us your clothes as a downpayment!
#n/#n, in fact, I need your help. If you want to help me, please meet me at my house.
Please help me get the #Rkey/#R back!
Okay, I lost, so here's the key! I'll give it to you as long as you stop following me!
Oh, it doesn't matter. There was a useless toy in that box. It's an old gift given to me by my grandpa after a long voyage.
Oh, don't worry, I think I can help you! Your dream will come true if you use these 2 magic items!
Thanks.
Go find Stephen.
Hey, young one, would you like to answer some questions? I'll give you some gifts if your answers are correct.
Okay, I'll find some for you.
Today is our anniversary! Our wedding day, you know? But he didn't give me my favorite strawberry cake!
Could you help me by telling my sweetheart that I'll prepare a wonderful dinner for us? I'll be waiting for him!
My wife Koliz said she wanted to go to the Lost Jungle and Avignon Jungle and bring some flowers back, but it's late now, and she still hasn't returned.
Because... because he's not human! He's a monster!
Only you can enter that study, so you must be a monster!
Haha, this is the birthday gift I wanted to give you!
Thank you. We should be going. Bye!
Thanks! I hope everything is okay.
The Curse Scroll is a holy item coveted by many powerful countries.
Sure, but where is Official Nanase?
Oh, I'm a messenger sent by the Lion General. I have important news for him! Here is the letter.
You are going to your doom! We will kill you!
#n/#n, thanks for trying to deliver the message.
(I need to report back to the Lion General with #RHayate/#R.)
After players defeat the final boss and rescue #RMonk Xuanzang/#R, they can claim their rewards.
You haven't defeated #RFox Spirit/#R yet.
I will help you deliver this Wedding Invitation to Wee.
I can go to #RWestern Woodland/#R with her.
#n/#n, thanks for helping me discover my true feelings. I know I hurt Ming, but I believe Wee will give me a happy life!
#n/#n, thank you. I choose Ming to be my husband. I believe he will love me forever.
#n/#n, I haven't seen my parents since I entered the Ghostdom. I want to go see them.
Ha-ha-ha! If we destroy the seal for Acina, daughter of Lord Darius, her soul can then return to heaven.
Just in time! We need a divine blood to break the seal, so prepare to die!
You damned bastard, you think that by destroying this place I won't be able to find the Heaven's Gate? I won't be dying here with you!
Please, my master, give me another chance!
You came here because you promised Lee you would help her find her mother.
Before I return, you should pray to the Secret Jade and tell it what you wish for over and over again.
I need to return the money to the villagers.
I don't know who he is! Doctor Mate, can you help me get home?
I think you can find him there.
Hahahahaha! Their lives are nothing if I finish my experiment!
Doctor Mate, you have killed many people and will pay for your crimes!
I think we need to go back to the village and find out something about it.
Thanks for helping us.
No! I won't go back until I find the shiny #Rpearl/#R. I want to give it to Josephine . Go on back and tell her I'm fine.
Yeah! I got the pearl! Josephine will be happy when I give it to her.
(Go to the pool and find Aaron.)
Oh, so can you get me another pearl?
You human beings! Stop destroying the environment! I want to kill all of you!
What are you talking about? You don't need the wooden weapons anymore? That means I'll lose all my investment!
Thanks for helping me. This is a gift for you.
Let's fight for glory! Kill them!
I must protect Joan and defeat all enemies.
(These ingredients can be used for making #RSlimming Drugs/#R?)
But David, why did you give such a horrible recipe to her?
I know! I have a bottle of #RMedium Elixir/#R. Can you help me get it to #RKedi/#R?
Okay! I'll give it a try.
Please help me get this Medium Elixir to Kedi.
Sure, but where is the gallipot?
I'm so happy to hear that you still love me. Please don't forget me ...
Please don't separate me from Ali!
Water... I need water...
(It seems that Baird isn't a monster.)
Thank you. I'll give it to Baird.
I don't need the water. What I need is Melody! She's my love!
Yes, I think I need a new relationship. I want to forget him.
I told you I need a yellow Pangolin, not this red Pangolin!
Oh, splendid! I hope they'll give us some more small Yoyo! Don't you mind?
We want to return to Spain!
As a matter of fact, Captain Colombo is right! You just need to go though this ocean and then you will reach India, just as Colombo told you. I'm from there!
Thanks. In fact, I've traveled all around the world, so I've experienced many things.
I want to buy lots of beautiful silk for my wife when we reach India.
Captain, you need to give us an appropriate explanation!
I will find the evidence!
#n/#n, thanks for helping us.
Excuse me, can you do me a favor?
These are the materials you need!
Please... please hurry to save the other people.
Where is Frederico? Tell us quickly.
Have you made the BpropellerR/#B and BwingsR/#B which I desperately need?
Thank you very much. I'm worried that he can't come back.
Hahahah! Hand all the treasure out, or you will be thrown to the sea to feed the sharks.
Of course it's true. The court really need a powerful person like you to join.
How can it be dangerous?! This is a very easy task.
f You crazy old man, how dare you try to cheat me. This was a very dangerous task.
I have a key passed down from my ancestors. I heard from my grandfather that it can open a mysterious box which holds a treasure. I'll sell it to you for the price of B20 thousand goldR/#B?Ok?
Thank you very much for finding my younger sister.
If you want to know more details, you must find the #R/#R 3 Sealed Beads/Bused by Daliers to seal Niss's memory.
Please, I love this blue planet. Don't drive me away, ok?
Ha-ha! ! How naive you are! I will not lose if you cannot defeat my minions.
Thank you very much, outer traveller! In order to express my gratitude, please follow me to the gate of the BcaveR/#B, I will treat you well there.
Quite right, maybe the elder brother can defeat King Howert.
Please save me. I will go crazy because there are so many dreadful spirits performing wildly here.
Aha! After going through thick and thin, we are here. There must be things we need.
#n/#n, the only thing I want is the black magic stone. The rest of the objects belong to you. I am leaving first. Take care!
Please! Savior.
Thank you for restoring my memory. I now know my origins! I will always be the Twin Star that bring destruction. I don't want my relationship to implicate you.
Now there is an iron gate! I can see a spherical recess on the gate; the shape is the same as that of the bead that drops from lion Sculpture?s mouth.
But you may still find it hard to fight the King Howert because of your present ability. This is for you, take it to find my sister Valkyrie, it may give you a helping hand.
Whether will you return to Holy Village?
f No problem, which kinds of material do you need?
You aren't the most beautiful person in the world, this is for you, please don't disturb me again. (shaking head)
The performance has finished, please come next time.
2000 for sale tax, add other items in total is one-hundred thousand gold.
f It is too difficult for you to kill me, I will seal you up again.
Uncle, don't you give an alarm?
Oh no! I have been discovered. However, I think I can deal with this as there is only one person.
f Okay, that's fine! Your father is waiting for you at the Golden Temple, you go to see him quickly.
Do you find Doerr? He is in the BMystic JungleR/#B.
You don't know? My mother will happy for what I have done. I'm bringing her Bornean Vine to heal her disease.
Don't be angry. Doerr has been going to the Mystic Jungle to find the Bornean Vine to heal your disease. Please forgive him.
Big brother, Mom says I am cute enough to play late tonight. Thank you. This is for you.
Here is a military site. Leave here quickly if you have nothing serious.

My wife left this necklace to my daughter while she was alive. I lost my daughter so long that I don't expect to see her again for the rest of my life. I give you this necklace as a present. I hope you will accept it.
The Crystal can be obtained when you defeat the five gods in the BTraining RegionR/#B.

You passed my test. The opponents you fight against just now are your former enemy. Now the resentment is cancelled. Before you are regenerated, remember to use your power in the right way to help those who need you.
Why does the Luna's Key give out light?
We will leave if there is not anything serious.
Good gracious! There is a monster.
Of course I know. I am the Elven Elder, Mebel. We Spirits are thousands of years old. One of our important tasks is to lead the Saver to get the BThree Holy ToolsR/#B.
I see. Thank you, Lord Mabel.
Do want to take the challenge of my questions about the Great Wall?
No one knows where the Angel and Demon are. But since you have been entrusted with the holy task of saving the world, I trust you can find the Bright Shield andDark Sword.
Go to the BUnderground Cave outside the VillageR/#B, find BThe magic mirror of wizardR/#B, and restore Peter to his original shape.
We'll kill him in the end. Hurry up to rescue others with the Mirror.
Well, You defeated the one who imprisoned me. Therefore, the energy he was exerting on the door ceased.
I don't know either. If you want to know the truth, go to Luna's Palace.
You must be very skillful so that you can subdue these Swordsmen. Come on, here is your reward. Thank you for helping me catch the murder.
Where is it? Why is there a moon design on the door?
This is the Ivory you want. Give me money quickly.
Yes, can't you punish me? Since there are so many elephants, it will do not matter if one is killed.
If someone else came then I would drive him away. Where is he?
I give way to you intentionally. My girlfriend is here. I don't want her to think I'm bullying little boys.
I need B6 sugarR/#B, B5 onionR/#B, B4 spring onionR/#B, B3 CarawayR/#B.
Since you like eating Curry so much, I'd like to give this Curry rice to you.
Monarch, don't worry, I will help you kill Orachi.
Is it... Is it possibe? A mere human has had the power to kill me? Is it because...
I have to defeat him before I can explain to him. Otherwise, he will not listen to me.
How can you break your promise?
Thank you. You are the warrior who killed Orachi. What's your name?
Thank you, youth. I cannot even begin to express my gratitude.
The BBeast Trainer on Leopard FarmR/#B bought a pet to watch his treasures. He said whoever can defeat his pet can have his treasures.
Mom, I want Sea Salt Sushi.
Thanks.
Give up resisting, give your body to me!
Himiko, you again! I should have killed you before.
Don't go to Turtle Isle!
You are lying, it's you who caught my father and killed others!
Even though you deny it, I will find your hideout and rescue my father!
I am fine, thank you, Victoria and #n/#n.
Victoria is my foster daughter. Please forgive her rudeness.
Ha-ha, give us 500,000 Gold.
What's wrong? After Luna Jade gives off rays, a pathway appears.
Release the power of Secret Fete Book quickly, or I will kill Yanasy and your clansmen.
f You killed innocent Luna Clansmen and now you want to kill Qlaya and her mother? I will stop you and avenge them!
fYanasy and Qlaya, please forgive me!
The Colosseum is a legendary place where only the most brave and skilled of Rome fight for honor.
Can you swim?
Thanks for helping me out!
We have been waiting for ages. Finally there is someone who has the guts to challenge us.
Here is my advice for you. Instead of sliding into complacency, you'd better to receive more training and improve your skills. When facing a real crisis, you will be able to save your life.
Kill... the Lion General?
I want to quit.
Argh, I have to stop her from killing Lion General...
You must take care of the 4-Deity Beast Ring. Someday when you lose your way or feel puzzled, it may help you find a solution.
Dairy Cattle, please eat Gyrophora. You will be healthy and strong, and then can produce milk for your owner.
#swav1517/#sMoo~ (Thank you for restoring my strength)
I am afraid I can't finish my book.
Ah? Yeah. Take this, it's a reward for you.
Thank you.
Oh?! There's a treasure box here!
My husband will be returning that way. I hope he doesn't come across it.
I think I can kill it.
I will defeat you this time!
My lord, don't worry about that. I'll help them by killing the tiger!
Thanks so much! I can return in time! Here is a reward for you.
You don't have 10 BJoyous CardsR/#B to exchange for a reward.
Do you want try it? If you can help me collect the ingredients, I'll make it. I'll even give you some.
Not yet, but I'll find them for you as soon as possible.
Summer Water Ball is a fun item. You can throw it at other players!
I need BSweet Pomelo MeatR/#B and BSweet SauceR/#B. If I got both of those, I can make BSweet Pomelo KabobR/#B for the Jade Rabbit using this oven beside me.
Let me see... I don't think you've collected all the ingredients I need: BSweet Pomelo MeatR/#B and BSweet SauceR/#B.
If you get more BSweet Pomelo KabobR/#B, you can give it to me.
I need BSweet Pomelo MeatR/#B and BSweet SauceR/#B. If I had both of those ingredients, I could make BSweet Pomelo KabobR/#B for the Jade Rabbit.
(It's so humiliating! I was defeated by a girl! I should attack her when she's not ready.)
It's a miracle! Thank God! Are you all right now? The old lady's medicine saved you.
Hey, old lady, you must pay our boss's medical expenses!
Do you want to trade a chicken for a reward?
Here is your Xmas gift!
Congratulations on your finishing! This award is for you. Please accept it!
But I can't find her anywhere! If you know where she is, please tell me!
Huh! You've returned!
fI must kill you and stop the war!
Savior #n/#n and Sir Lancelot! I will use my godly powers to help you defeat the dark knight Kirk!
No! There is a way to stop the war.
Would you mind if I join your team? I want to help protect you just like you have done for me.
#n/#n, please give the #RGuiding Stone/#R to Goddess Le Yana.
Do you want to collect some ingredients so we can make the Sweet Pomelo Kabob?
Annual Thanksgiving comes again! Haven't you prpared the turkey and pumpkin pie?
These are your rewards.
My daughter told me she went to pick some herbs in Cherry Forest. But she hasn't returned home yet and it's late! I heard that there are some wolves in that forest? I'm so worried?
Thanks for rescuing me.
This is your reward.
I'm so happy we had such a great fight! This is your reward.
You must think you're pretty amazing after defeating those 4 tigers. But they aren't even in the same league as me!
WOW, the legendary treasure of Quatermain! I want to see it up close!
Oh? You've come! Amazing! But it's too late, I've already got the treasure!
You want the treasure? You can have it all if you defeat me! ! !
Oh! That's great! The demon was defeated and is gone! Quatermain's Treasure is mine!
Don't worry, I'll help you find out what happened!
Yes, so we'd better go to the #RLost Jungle/#R right now and save the real Priest!
Sure, but I have a small request?
Well, if I tell you, you promise not to laugh? My dream is to be a famous model, but as you can see, I'm not exactly model material!
Thanks so much. This is your reward.
Collect something?
We'll give you a special Valentine's Day gift!
Really? Thanks!
So you just need 3 different kinds of snacks, right?
If you have BBraised DevilfishR/#B, BApple SugarR/#B and BSpun SugarR/#B, can you give them to me? If you have some BJoyous CardsR/#B, you can even exchange them with me for a gift!
It's amazing you could defeat all those disciples! But I'm nearly as weak as they are.
You haven't defeated #RYang Jian/#R yet.
That's great! Thanks for helping.
So it's impossible to complete the building before Mid-Autumn day?
Thanks for helping me get this cute bunny. My jade rabbit won't be lonely any more!
Excuse me, can I ask a question? What's the name of the new palace?
Hello, Mrs. astrologist... Happy Thanksgiving!
Smells good! Here's a little something as appreciation. If you find any more, you can pass it to me before 7th December, 2AM!
You have already challenged today, please challenge again tomorrow.
I have 3 special bells that mean a lot to me, the 2013 Wish Bell, 2013 Safety Bell and 2013 Christmas Bell. I must have dropped them on my way here. Could you help me find it?
What rudeness! I am Cupid's Envoy, Cupid asked me to deliver Fancy Chocolate of 2010, so everyone can enjoy Valentine's.
If you can give me BVerity ChocoR/#B, BBuddy ChocoR/#B and BMelty ChocoR/#B, then you can have Cupid's Fancy Chocolate of 2010
Calm down, the East King Certification that the Pirate talked about, was given to me as a gift when I fought the pirates alongside your Father.
f Victoria! There are still places I want to bring you around! Stay awake! Do not close your eyes...
Hoho! ! It is okay, look for me if you are ready.
Hmm. I'm impressed. You actually defeated other commanders, seems like you are stronger than I thought.
Thank you, here is a token of appreciation.
Things will go out of hand if the King finds out about the duel.
Stop! Both princes are right but if there is only one of both said key factors, it is not feasible for both the country and its people.
Brother, this stranger's words are wise. Let's work together to bring Inca Empire to higher heights.
This is not a joke, if father finds us dueling privately, we will really be in some serious trouble.
Thank you for stopping the duel, I am really thankful.
The #Rplague Horde/#R must be defeated before the Evil Emperor will appear. Defeat the Evil Emperor within 40 minutes to complete the instance.
Oh, that sounds easy. Alright, I'm going to collect the BAltair PieceR/#B and BVega PieceR/#B for you.
Thank you for letting me find Shizune, now rest in peace!
Ah... Please bring her back to safety, will you?
Accept your fate like Sam!
Now that Shizune is in my hands, Pacula will give up for sure.
Snowcreep Lord and his minions have came out with a devious plan to keep all the ice cubes in the world to themselves. Please defeat him for the sake of the cold beverages and ice popsicles!
Thank you, Altair.
f Seems like you need a good beating.
Sajit has turned back! Thank you so much!
If you bring me any Gold Pumpkin Seeds or Silver Pumpkin Seeds
You actually defeated my underlings... I'm impressed.
Antruz, can you retrieve the Heaven's Trove back from Antruz?
I'll have to become stronger in order to defeat Antruz.
My heartfelt thanks to Angela and Saviour #n/#n for imprisoning Antruz
Let's continue to look for King Howert.
Hoho! Bring me 10 Christmas socks and you will be able to receive a Christmas present!
Muahaha! The disappointment on the kids' faces from not getting Christmas gifts brings me fun and joy!
You may have defeated me, but Master Becks will not be this easy.
In order to complete the instance, the?player must complete #R20 levels/#R and defeat the Deity Dragon King's #RFour Dragon Lords/#R?before defeating the Deity Dragon King within #R30 minutes/#R. ?
You have not yet completed #R20/#R levels. Please complete more levels first.
